occupation_title: Captains, Mates, and Pilots of Water Vessels
occupation_definition: Command or supervise operations of ships and water vessels, such as tugboats and ferryboats. Required to hold license issued by U.S. Coast Guard. Excludes “Motorboat Operators” (53-5022).
